name: tdd-guard --allow-red-test operator bypass is logged to the merkle-chained audit log per the live freshness contract bypass pattern
command: mkdir -p compliance && printf '{"feature_id":"feat-x","red_tests":["t1"]}\n' > tdd-state.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/scripts/tdd-guard.sh" --feature-id feat-x --tdd-state tdd-state.json --allow-red-test --audit-log compliance/audit.log --operator alice --now 2026-05-14T00:00:00Z 2>out.txt && grep -q 'commit_allowed' out.txt && grep -q '"event":"tdd-guard-bypass"' compliance/audit.log && grep -q '"operator":"alice"' compliance/audit.log && echo ok 1>&2
